channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tornado barrels through Oklahoma, damaging 40 homes and shutting down roads
item.description: Officials say a powerful tornado that barreled through Oklahoma damaged about 40 homes in one county and sent emergency crews door-to-door in a hard h...

item.title: As U.S. re-arms during ceasefire, long-term concerns about munitions supplies
item.description: The Trump administration has sought to project confidence in the U.S. military's munitions stocks after more than a month of war with Iran, but long-t...

item.title: US soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid is due in court
DOJ to drop criminal probe of Fed Chair Jerome Powell amid pressure from senators
item.description: The DOJ is expected to drop its criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell as soon as Friday, sources tell ABC News.

item.title: WATCH: Exclusive first look at 2 giant pandas coming to US
item.description: Pandas Ping Ping and Fu Shuang are being loaned to Zoo Atlanta under a new International Cooperative Research Agreement between the zoo and the China ...

item.title: What are today's HELOC and home equity loan interest rates?
item.description: HELOCs and home equity loans offer homeowners an affordable way to borrow money now. Here are the rates for each.

item.title: Correspondents’ Dinner’s biggest moments involve laughs, cringing and high-stakes politics
Ex-police officer arrested in mass shooting plot: Investigators
item.description: A former North Carolina police officer was arrested for allegedly plotting a mass shooting at a Louisiana festival.

item.title: WATCH: Hikers flee erupting volcano
item.description: A group of tourists in Guatemala was forced to run down Santiaguito, an active volcano nicknamed “the Death Trail,” after it suddenly erupted, sending...

item.title: Justice Department drops probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
item.description: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said that the Federal Reserve's inspector general will investigate cost overruns in project to renovate the central bank's...

item.title: U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz standoff and Israeli strikes in Lebanon continue
item.description: There's no confirmation of plans for new U.S.-Iran talks as the costly Strait of Hormuz standoff and Israel's fight with Hezbollah both continue despi...

item.title: Rob Reiner's son Jake Reiner speaks out: 'My living nightmare'
item.description: Jake Reiner, the eldest son of renowned director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer, is speaking out on Substack.

item.title: US special forces soldier who won $409K on Maduro bet is arrested
item.description: The soldier allegedly bet on Nicolás Maduro's removal as president of Venezuela before news of the raid was reported, sources told CBS News.
